errors_found: PR agent (Diego) reported TYPO_FIXED but never created actual GitHub PR

summary: Pipeline execution on 2026-03-03 had a critical failure in the PR-to-review handoff. Oscar (state) succeeded, Elena (plan) created valid plan for Phase 4 acoustics. Diego (PR) fixed a typo in constants.ts but failed to push the branch and create a valid PR. Marco (reviewer) wasted 3 retries on a non-existent PR#0. New RULE-006 added to enforce PR validation before review handoff.
